events.note: Generated sample workflow item from Universal 172-step process.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 1
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Brainstorm 10+ possible topics without filtering.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 2
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Research current trends and real-world relevance of each.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 3
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Score each topic for alignment with your goals and values.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 4
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Assess feasibility including time, budget, skills, and resources.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 5
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Rank the top 5 topics by potential impact versus effort.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 6
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Select the single primary topic.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 7
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Write a one-paragraph description of the chosen topic.

tasks.description: Macro 1: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest | Step 8
tasks.macro_title: Identify the Topic or Area of Interest
tasks.title: Get quick validation from 1–2 trusted people.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 9
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Break the topic into 3–5 sub-problems.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 10
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Turn each sub-problem into a clear, testable question.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 11
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Choose the single most important question to solve first.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 12
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Add measurable success criteria to the question.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 13
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Rewrite it in precise How or What effect form.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 14
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Check that it is solvable within your constraints.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 15
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Validate the final question with a quick stakeholder review.

tasks.description: Macro 2: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement | Step 16
tasks.macro_title: Formulate the Specific Question or Problem Statement
tasks.title: Lock the core question in writing.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 17
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Search academic, industry, and competitor sources.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 18
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Interview 3–5 subject-matter experts or users.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 19
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Collect quantitative data and statistics.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 20
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Identify gaps in existing knowledge.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 21
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Summarize key findings in a one-page brief.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 22
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Note any biases or limitations in the data.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 23
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Create a known versus unknown matrix.

tasks.description: Macro 3: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering | Step 24
tasks.macro_title: Conduct Preliminary Research and Background Gathering
tasks.title: Update your question if new information requires it.

tasks.title: List everything that is explicitly in scope.

tasks.title: List everything that is explicitly out of scope.

tasks.title: Identify any scope creep risks.
